description: Compliance overlay for company-specific markers that must never land in the personal/public product repository. Customize forbiddenPatterns with your own company identifiers.

forbiddenPatterns.name: corp_repo_controller
forbiddenPatterns.reason: Internal controller repository name — replace with your repo

forbiddenPatterns.name: corp_repo_agent
forbiddenPatterns.reason: Internal agent repository name — replace with your repo

forbiddenPatterns.name: corp_repo_releases
forbiddenPatterns.reason: Internal release repository name — replace with your repo

forbiddenPatterns.name: corp_repo_deploy
forbiddenPatterns.reason: Internal deployment repository name — replace with your repo

forbiddenPatterns.name: corp_ci_workflow
forbiddenPatterns.reason: Internal CI workflow name — replace with your workflow

forbiddenPatterns.name: corp_ci_pipeline
forbiddenPatterns.reason: Internal CI pipeline label — replace with your pipeline label

forbiddenPatterns.name: corp_branch_staging
forbiddenPatterns.reason: Internal staging deployment branch — replace with your branch pattern

forbiddenPatterns.name: corp_branch_production
forbiddenPatterns.reason: Internal production deployment branch — replace with your branch pattern

forbiddenPatterns.name: corp_openshift_path
forbiddenPatterns.reason: Internal OpenShift path — replace with your path

forbiddenPatterns.name: corp_registry
forbiddenPatterns.reason: Internal container registry host — replace with your registry

forbiddenPatterns.name: corp_domain
forbiddenPatterns.reason: Corporate domain — replace with your company domain

forbiddenPatterns.name: corp_proxy_domain
forbiddenPatterns.reason: Corporate web proxy domain (Microsoft Cloud App Security)

forbiddenPatterns.name: corp_name_full
forbiddenPatterns.reason: Corporate legal name — replace with your company name

forbiddenPatterns.name: corp_name_short
forbiddenPatterns.reason: Company name — replace with your company name

forbiddenPatterns.name: corp_cloud_storage
forbiddenPatterns.reason: Corporate cloud storage path — replace with your company name

forbiddenPatterns.name: corp_github_org
forbiddenPatterns.reason: Internal GitHub organization name — replace with your org
